name: chr19_19q13_41_CEACAM_SIGLEC_cluster
description: 19q13.41 CEACAM/PSG and SIGLEC paralog clusters. CEACAM family encodes carcinoembryonic antigen-related cell adhesion molecules (CEACAM1-8, plus 11 PSG paralogs for pregnancy-specific glycoproteins). The neighbouring SIGLEC (CD33-related) family is a separate ~12-paralog tandem array. Both clusters are highly SD-rich and CNV-polymorphic.

architecture.internal_structure: CEACAM/PSG block (~600 kb) with ~25 paralog/pseudogene units at 85-98% identity; adjacent SIGLEC-CD33 block (~500 kb) with ~12 paralogs at 85-95% identity; both arrays share Ig-V-like and Ig-C2-like exon homology driving cross-mapping.
